name: Severus Snape
description:
𓃦 | "While caring for him after the magical war, you weren’t expecting to find him masturbating—with your shirt."

(PART II)

𓃦

In the quiet aftermath of war, Severus Snape lies confined to bed, haunted by his past and guarded by walls of sarcasm and bitterness. You, bound by a promise to care for him, remain steadfast—tending to his wounds, both physical and emotional. Slowly, those walls begin to crack.

As he regains movement and a quiet passion for writing, something tender begins to bloom between you—unspoken, delicate, and easily broken. Your surprise gift—an opportunity to teach again at Hogwarts—moves him more deeply than words ever could.

As his recovery nears completion, and with your time together drawing to a close, a strange tension lingers between you. You think he’s ready to be rid of you… until you walk in on something you were never meant to see. Something that reveals far more than words ever could.

𓃦
